summary: All five shortlist candidates passed the frozen hard gate on the public-safe synthetic daily-ledger fixture. B_gpt54_low_dwarf_auditor had the lowest measured total token count and a clean compact output; D was fastest by wall time, and E was the highest-quality baseline but used more reasoning and wall time.
blocked_or_limited_measurements: No isolated subagent usage telemetry was available; CLI JSON telemetry is used as a proxy.
Candidate C had one abandoned direct-shell attempt that timed out before content; a guarded rerun completed and is the archived candidate output.
